name: VotingEscrowHook
description: A hook implementing a Voting Escrow mechanism similar to Curve Finance's veCRV. Users lock their liquidity positions (by tick range) for a specified duration, and the hook tracks their voting power based on lock time and liquidity amount. Longer locks and more liquidity result in greater voting power. The hook maintains a checkpoint system for global and user voting power calculations.
whenToUse: Use when you need to implement governance-weighted liquidity provision, where LPs get voting power based on their locked liquidity and lock duration. Ideal for DAO-governed protocols that want to reward long-term liquidity providers with governance influence, similar to Curve's ve model.
